revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Wpsearch]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects W]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects W]]</noinclude>"
Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects W
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
